articles.title: Tripped circuit breaker cuts Senate AC during majority no-show

articles.title: Knocking sounds raise hope in Lao cave rescue operation

articles.title: Trump Sets New Posting Record as Mania Spirals Out of Control
articles.description: Photo Illustration by Victoria Sunday/The Daily Beast/Getty Images/Reuters President Donald Trump’s manic posting exploded to an unprecedented level in May, a Daily Beast analysis has found. We calculated that his average posts per day spiked to 27, or the equivalent of just over once every hour of every day. Our analysis found that Trump posted on Truth Social an astounding 861 times last month, sharing everything from truly deranged AI-generated memes to meltdowns and even an image of him lounging shirtless in the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool with a bikini-clad woman. Read more at The Daily Beast.
